title: WTW makes EMEA insurance leadership and regional structure changes to accelerate AI strategy
description: LONDON, March 30, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- WTW (NASDAQ: WTW), a leading global advisory, broking and solutions company, has announced structural and strategic changes to the EMEA regional operations of its Insurance Consulting and Technology business. In response to technological disruption and client demand, dedicated EMEA P&C and EMEA Life businesses have been established to enable deeper expertise, more consistent delivery, and to drive innovation at scale and speed,

title: Wolters Kluwer powers high‑stakes professional decision‑making by advancing its Expert AI strategy
description: Wolters Kluwer today highlighted the rapid momentum of its AI innovation, underscoring how its Expert AI approach delivers fast, explainable answers.

title: Spanish tech company Lleida.net Obtains New Brazilian Patent
description: Madrid, March 30, 2026.- Brazil's National Institute of Industrial Property (INPI) has granted Lleida.net (BME:LLN) (EPA:ALLLN) a patent for its method for recording and certifying the receipt of electronic mail, the second it has received in that country.

title: Lleida.net obtém patente no Brasil
description: Madrid, 30 de março de 2026.- O Instituto Nacional da Propriedade Industrial do Brasil (INPI) concedeu à Lleida.net (BME:LLN) (EPA:ALLLN) uma patente para seu método de registro e certificação de recebimento de correio eletrônico, a segunda que a empresa obtém no país.

title: Harju Elekter Group's audited Annual Report 2025
description: AS Harju Elekter Group presents its consolidated audited Annual Report for 2025 prepared by the Management Board and approved by the Supervisory Board. Compared to the unaudited interim report published on 19 February 2026, there are no differences in the audited financial results.

title: Harju Elekter kontserni 2025. aasta auditeeritud majandusaasta aruanne
description: AS Harju Elekter Group esitab juhatuse poolt koostatud ja nõukogu poolt heaks kiidetud 2025. aasta konsolideeritud ja auditeeritud majandusaasta aruande. Võrreldes 19.02.2026 avaldatud auditeerimata vahearuandega, ei ole auditeeritud aastaaruandes finantstulemustes erinevusi.

title: Bitdeer Engages DCI to Finalise Development of Norway’s Largest AI Data Center
description:
Expected to be completed as early as December 2026, the 180 MW Tydal Data Center (TDC) will primarily be used for co-location services of Nvidia’s latest Vera Rubin AI technology
